script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Morning, Sarah. July 19th, 2026. Welcome to The Daily Tanu-chan Show.
script.ja: おはようございます、サラさん。2026年7月19日、『ザ・デイリー・タヌちゃん・ショー』へようこそ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Morning, Alex. It's already feeling pretty warm out there, isn't it?
script.ja: おはようございます、アレックス。もうかなり暑いね、外は。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, I heard the forecast. They're saying mainly clear, high of 34 degrees Celsius again today. Only 6% chance of rain.
script.ja: ええ、予報聞きました。今日はほとんど晴れで、また最高気温34度だそうです。雨の確率は6%だけ。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Sounds about right. I had my tea this morning, looking out the window, and it was already so bright.
script.ja: そんな感じだよね。今朝、窓の外を見ながらお茶を飲んでたんだけど、もうすごく明るかった。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I need my coffee. These mornings are still a bit of a blur, even though my little one is finally sleeping a bit better.
script.ja: 僕はコーヒーが必要です。うちの子がようやく少し寝るようになったのに、朝はまだちょっとぼんやりしています。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: That's good, though. More sleep helps.
script.ja: でもそれは良いことね。睡眠が増えるのは助かる。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: It does. I saw some news about a clothing company making mobile game character costumes. Nutte and Axel Mark. That's kind of cool.
script.ja: そうですね。ニュースで服の会社がモバイルゲームのキャラクター衣装を作るって見ました。NutteとAxel Mark。ちょっと面白いですよね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: My daughter would like that. She's always drawing characters.
script.ja: うちの娘が喜びそうね。いつもキャラクターを描いてるから。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, I wonder if they'll go for more classic characters too, or just the really popular new ones. It sounds like a pretty big project.
script.ja: ええ、もっとクラシックなキャラクターもやるのか、それとも本当に人気のある新しいものだけなのか、気になります。かなり大きなプロジェクトみたいですよね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Probably the popular ones first.
script.ja: たぶん、まずは人気のものからでしょうね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: True. Oh, and I saw that the court rejected Kyoto residents' request to halt the Oi nuclear power plant. I feel like I read that headline every year.
script.ja: 確かに。あと、裁判所が京都の住民による大飯原発の運転停止要請を退けたっていうニュースを見ました。毎年この見出しを読んでいる気がします。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It's a recurring issue, yes.
script.ja: 繰り返される問題ね、ええ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: It just never seems to change anything. You'd think after all this time, there'd be some kind of resolution.
script.ja: 結局何も変わらない気がします。こんなに時間が経ったんだから、何らかの解決があるはずなのに。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It's complex.
script.ja: 複雑なことなのよ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I guess. Also, there's a music venue in Tokyo looking for a band to live on the premises and perform every day for a week. That sounds pretty intense, actually.
script.ja: そうですね。あと、東京の音楽会場が、敷地内に住み込みで1週間毎日演奏するバンドを探しているそうです。結構大変そうですよね、実際。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: A full-time commitment.
script.ja: フルタイムのコミットメントね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, like a 24/7 gig. I'd be a bit... wary of that, honestly. Living with a band for a week straight?
script.ja: ええ、24時間営業みたいな。正直、ちょっと…『wary』ですね。1週間ぶっ通しでバンドと一緒に暮らすなんて？

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Wary means cautious or careful. Like you're not fully trusting of the situation.
script.ja: Waryは、用心深いとか慎重な、という意味よ。状況を完全に信用していないような状態ね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Exactly. I'd be wary of the noise, the food, everything. My wife would definitely not be okay with that idea.
script.ja: まさに。騒音とか、食事とか、何もかもに警戒しちゃいます。妻は絶対その考えには賛成しないでしょうね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It's not for everyone.
script.ja: 誰にでもできることじゃないわね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: No, definitely not for me these days. Speaking of days, tomorrow's a holiday, isn't it? Umi no Hi.
script.ja: ええ、今の僕には絶対無理です。日といえば、明日は祝日ですよね？海の日。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: That's right. The 20th. It's Marine Day.
script.ja: そうね。20日よ。海の日ね。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Right. I always forget what it's for. Something about Emperor Meiji and a boat, wasn't it?
script.ja: そうそう。いつも何のための日か忘れちゃうんです。明治天皇と船の話でしたっけ？

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Yes, on July 20th, 1876, Emperor Meiji returned to Yokohama by boat after a trip to Tohoku. It became a national holiday in 1996.
script.ja: ええ、1876年7月20日に、明治天皇が東北地方への巡幸を終えて船で横浜に帰着したの。1996年に国民の祝日になったわ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Oh, I didn't know that. That's pretty cool, actually. A holiday to remember a boat trip.
script.ja: へえ、知りませんでした。結構面白いですね、船旅を記念する祝日なんて。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: It is. I took my morning walk today, down by the river. It was already so warm, even at six AM.
script.ja: そうね。今朝、川沿いを散歩したの。もう午前6時なのに、すでにとても暑かったわ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Six AM? Wow. I was still trying to get my little one to eat his breakfast. Some mornings are just a bit... grueling.
script.ja: 午前6時？すごいですね。僕はまだうちの子に朝食を食べさせようとしていました。いくつかの朝は、ちょっと…『grueling』なんです。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Grueling means very tiring and difficult. I remember those days.
script.ja: Gruelingは、とても疲れて大変な、という意味よ。そういう日々、覚えてるわ。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yeah, very tiring. But then he'll give me a big smile, and it makes it all worth it. Those moments are so precious, but they're so... fleeting.
script.ja: ええ、とても疲れます。でも、彼がにっこり笑ってくれると、全部報われるんです。あの瞬間はとても貴重なのに、すごく…『fleeting』なんですよね。

script.speaker: Sarah
script.text: Fleeting means passing quickly. You're right, they do.
script.ja: Fleetingは、あっという間に過ぎ去る、という意味よ。そうね、本当にそうね。

news.title: Clothing company to bring popular Japanese mobile games’ character costumes to life
news.summary: We can’t get enough of cosplay, so we welcome news that clothes company Nutte, in conjunction with mobile phone game makers Axel Mark, have obtained an official license…

news.summary: A district court on Tuesday rejected a request by residents of Kyoto Prefecture to halt the operation of nuclear reactors at a power plant in a neighboring area…

news.title: Tokyo music venue looking for a band to live on the premises and perform every day for a week
news.summary: If you and your crew are passionate about music, live near Japan’s capital, and are looking for an exciting new challenge, then let it be known that a…

wikipedia.title: 海の日
wikipedia.description: 明治9年7月20日、明治天皇が東北地方の巡幸を終えて船で横浜に帰着したことから、昭和16年に「海の記念日」と制定。平成8年に「海の日」として国民の祝日になり、平成15年から7月の第3月曜日に。
